notes: SQ-2 field-surface consumer + Responses API surface. Iris POSTs to /api/v1/chat/responses (the non-standard Responses surface design parked in A-1), sends the `conversation` request field, and its typed contract reads output[]/status/createdAt/conversationId/reasoning.summary/content. 2.0 emits none of these (contracts §1.3 dropped list; Responses API parked). BLOCKS G-2 removal of the conversation/Responses surface until Iris migrates or the surface is retained. ⚑ Bora.
